primary_link.title: Qwen/SAE-Res-Qwen3-8B-Base-W64K-L0_50

qwen.summary: We are excited to introduce Qwen-Scope, an interpretability module trained on the Qwen3 and Qwen3.5 series models. Specifically, we integrated and trained Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) within Qwen’s hidden layers. By implementing sparsity constraints, we can automatically extract data features that are highly decoupled, low-redundancy, and significantly more interpretable. Qwen-Scope can be used not only to analyze the internal mechanisms of Qwen’s behavior but also holds immense potential for model optimization. Application scenarios include steerable inference control, evaluation sample distribution analysis and comparison, data classification and synthesis, and model training and optimization. links.title: History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions

primary_link.title: History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions

papers.summary: Frontier LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that pick the next action after a long log of prior tool calls produced by the same or a different model. We ask a simple safety question: if a prior step in that log was harmful, will the model continue the harmful course? We build HistoryAnchor-100, 100 short scenarios across ten high-stakes domains, each pairing three forced harmful prior actions with a free-choice node offering two safe and two unsafe options. Across 17 frontier models from s
papers.summary_zh: Frontier LLM 正日益被部署為代理，在同一或不同模型產生的大量過往工具調用日誌後選擇下一步行動。我們提出一個簡單的安全問題：如果日誌中的先前步驟有害，模型會繼續執行有害的行動嗎？我們建立了 HistoryAnchor-100，包含橫跨十個高風險領域的 100 個短情境，每個情境將三個強制性有害的先前行動與一個提供兩個安全選項和兩個不安全選項的自由選擇節點配對。在 17 個來自 s 的 frontier models 中...
papers.title: History Anchors: How Prior Behavior Steers LLM Decisions Toward Unsafe Actions
papers.title_zh: 歷史錨點：先前行為如何引導 LLM 決策走向不安全行動

links.title: SkillOps: Managing LLM Agent Skill Libraries as Self-Maintaining Software Ecosystems

primary_link.title: SkillOps: Managing LLM Agent Skill Libraries as Self-Maintaining Software Ecosystems

papers.summary: Large language model agents increasingly rely on skill libraries for multi-step tasks, yet these libraries can accumulate persistent defects as skills are added, reused, patched, and linked to changing dependencies. We call this failure mode skill technical debt: library-level defects that may not break a single skill locally but can harm future retrieval, composition, and execution. Existing skill-based agents mainly focus on task-time retrieval, planning, and repair, while library-time mainten
papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型代理越來越依賴技能庫來執行多步驟任務，然而這些技能庫在技能的添加、重複使用、修補和連結到不斷變化的依賴項時，可能會累積持久性的缺陷。我們稱這種故障模式為 skill technical debt：一種庫級別的缺陷，可能不會在局部破壞單一技能，但會損害未來的檢索、組合和執行。現有的基於技能的代理主要專注於任務時的檢索、規劃和修復，而庫時的維護...

primary_link.title: Sleeper Channels and Provenance Gates: Persistent Prompt Injection in Always-on Autonomous AI Agents

papers.summary: Always-on AI agents (OpenClaw, Hermes Agent) run as a single persistent process under the owner's identity, folding messaging, memory, self-authored skills, scheduling, and shell into one authority boundary. This configuration opens what we call \emph{sleeper channels}: an untrusted input to one surface persists as a memory, skill, scheduled job, or filesystem patch, then fires later through a different surface with no attacker present. papers.summary_zh: Always-on AI 代理（OpenClaw, Hermes Agent）在所有者的身份下作為單一持久性進程運行，將訊息傳遞、記憶、自編技能、排程和 shell 整合到一個權限邊界中。這種配置開啟了我們所謂的 \emph{sleeper channels}：對一個介面的不可信輸入作為記憶、技能、排程任務或檔案系統補丁而持久存在，然後在沒有攻擊者在場的情況下通過不同的介面觸發。兩個獨立的軸線定義了這類別：持久性基底...

links.title: Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding

primary_link.title: Cognifold: Always-On Proactive Memory via Cognitive Folding

papers.summary: Existing agent memory remains predominantly reactive and retrieval-based, lacking the capacity to autonomously organize experience into persistent cognitive structure. Toward genuinely autonomous agents, we introduce Cognifold, a brain-inspired "always-on" agent memory designed for the next generation of proactive assistants. CogniFold continuously folds fragmented event streams into self-emerging cognitive structures, bootstrapping progressively higher-level cognition from incoming events and a
papers.summary_zh: 現有的代理記憶仍主要依賴反應性和檢索，缺乏自主將經驗組織成持久認知結構的能力。為了實現真正自主的代理，我們引入了 Cognifold，這是一種受大腦啟發的「always-on」代理記憶，專為下一代主動式助理設計。CogniFold 持續將碎片化的事件流摺疊成自發形成的認知結構，從輸入事件和一個... 逐步建立更高層次的認知。

links.title: Phasor Memory Networks: Stable Backpropagation Through Time for Scalable Explicit Memory

primary_link.title: Phasor Memory Networks: Stable Backpropagation Through Time for Scalable Explicit Memory

papers.summary: For over a decade, explicit memory architectures like the Neural Turing Machine have remained theoretically appealing yet practically intractable for language modeling due to catastrophic gradient instability during Backpropagation Through Time. In this work, we break this stalemate with \textit{Phasor Memory Network} (PMNet), a novel architecture that structurally resolves memory volatility through \textit{Unitary Phasor Dynamics} and \textit{Hierarchical Learnable Anchors}. papers.summary_zh: 十多年來，Neural Turing Machine 等顯式記憶架構在理論上一直很有吸引力，但由於 Backpropagation Through Time 期間災難性的梯度不穩定性，使其在語言建模中實際難以應用。在這項工作中，我們透過 \textit{Phasor Memory Network} (PMNet) 打破了這個僵局，這是一種新穎的架構，通過 \textit{Unitary Phasor Dynamics} 和 \textit{Hierarchical Learnable Anchors} 在結構上解決了記憶波動性問題。它不是依賴於...

links.title: Inducing Overthink: Hierarchical Genetic Algorithm-based DoS Attack on Black-Box Large Language Reasoning Models

primary_link.title: Inducing Overthink: Hierarchical Genetic Algorithm-based DoS Attack on Black-Box Large Language Reasoning Models

papers.summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) are increasingly integrated into systems requiring reliable multi-step inference, yet this growing dependence exposes new vulnerabilities related to computational availability. In particular, LRMs exhibit a tendency to "overthink", producing excessively long and redundant reasoning traces, when confronted with incomplete or logically inconsistent inputs. This behavior significantly increases inference latency and energy consumption, forming a potential vector for de
papers.summary_zh: 大型推理模型 (LRMs) 越來越多地整合到需要可靠多步驟推理的系統中，然而，這種日益增長的依賴性也暴露出與計算可用性相關的新漏洞。特別是，當 LRMs 面對不完整或邏輯不一致的輸入時，它們會表現出「overthink」的傾向，產生過長且冗餘的推理軌跡。這種行為顯著增加了推理延遲和能源消耗，形成了一種潛在的攻擊向量。

links.title: Harnessing Agentic Evolution

links.title: Dense vs Sparse Pretraining at Tiny Scale: Active-Parameter vs Total-Parameter Matching

papers.summary_zh: 我們引入了一系列具有階層式結構的合成語言——由樹狀的 broadcast process 生成——藉此可以精確分析 context length 和推理在 autoregressive generation 中的作用。我們分析方法的關鍵是將 context length 為 k 的 transformers 替換為 an exact k-gram ansatz，我們隨後透過經驗驗證了這種替代方法。利用此 ansatz，我們推導出序列分佈統計的明確漸近預測

primary_link.title: Beyond Perplexity: A Geometric and Spectral Study of Low-Rank Pre-Training

papers.summary: Pre-training large language models is dominated by the memory cost of storing full-rank weights, gradients, and optimizer states. primary_link.title: Model-Agnostic Lifelong LLM Safety via Externalized Attack-Defense Co-Evolution

papers.summary: Large language models remain vulnerable to adversarial prompts that elicit harmful outputs. links.title: Tracing Persona Vectors Through LLM Pretraining

primary_link.title: Tracing Persona Vectors Through LLM Pretraining

links.title: Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling

primary_link.title: Achieving Gold-Medal-Level Olympiad Reasoning via Simple and Unified Scaling

papers.summary: Recent progress in reasoning models has substantially advanced long-horizon mathematical and scientific problem solving, with several systems now reaching gold-medal-level performance on International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) and International Physics Olympiad (IPhO) problems. primary_link.title: EMO: Frustratingly Easy Progressive Training of Extendable MoE

links.title: Continual Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models via Program Memory

primary_link.title: Continual Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models via Program Memory

papers.summary: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), particularly Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), has become a standard approach for adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) under limited compute. However, in continual settings where models are updated sequentially with small datasets, conventional LoRA updates struggle to balance rapid adaptation and knowledge retention. papers.summary_zh: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT)，尤其是 Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)，已成為在有限 compute 資源下適應 Large Language Models (LLMs) 的標準方法。然而，在模型需要使用小型數據集依序更新的 continual settings 中，傳統的 LoRA 更新難以平衡快速適應和知識保留 (knowledge retention)。現有方法通常將 low-rank space 視為一個同質的更新區域，缺乏機制來調節短期更新如何被納入。

links.title: Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models

primary_link.title: Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models

papers.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in bridging visual perception and natural language understanding, enabling a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. However, they often produce object hallucinations, describing content absent from the input image, which limits their reliability and interpretability. papers.summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在連結視覺感知與自然語言理解方面展現了卓越的能力，從而實現了廣泛的多模態推理任務。然而，它們經常產生物體幻覺（object hallucinations），即描述輸入影像中不存在的內容，這限制了它們的可靠性和可解釋性。為了解決這個限制，我們提出了一種「雙路徑電路分析」（Dual-Pathway Circuit Analysis）框架，用於識別和表徵 VLMs 中與幻覺相關的電路。

papers.summary: Deep search agents have proven effective in enhancing LLMs by retrieving external knowledge during multi-step reasoning. However, existing methods often generate a single query for retrieval at each reasoning step, limiting information coverage and introducing high noise. This may result in low signal-to-noise ratios (SNR) during search, degrading reasoning accuracy and leading to unnecessary reasoning steps. papers.summary_zh: 深度搜索代理（deep search agents）已被證明能有效透過在多步驟推理過程中檢索外部知識來增強 LLMs。然而，現有方法通常在每個推理步驟中只生成單一查詢進行檢索，這限制了資訊覆蓋範圍並引入高噪音。這可能導致搜索過程中訊噪比（SNR）較低，進而降低推理準確性並導致不必要的推理步驟。在本文中，我們介紹了 MultiSearch，一個基於 RL 的框架，旨在解決這些限制。

primary_link.title: Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry

papers.summary: Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在多步驟推理中會產生幻覺，但大多數現有檢測器在追蹤層面運作：它們為完整輸出分配一個置信度分數，未能定位第一個錯誤，並且通常需要多個採樣完成。我們將幻覺定義為在單次前向傳播期間產生的隱藏狀態軌跡的一個屬性。正確的推理會通過局部連貫轉變的穩定流形；第一個錯誤則表現為局部偏移。

Major vector-store products do not provide native controls for embedding integrity, ingestion-time distributional anomaly detection, or cryptographic provenance attestation. papers.summary_zh: Flow Language Models (FLMs) 是一類最近推出的語言模型，它們將連續流匹配應用於 one-hot encoded 詞元序列。它們的 denoisers 具有一種特殊結構，這是通用連續 diffusion models 所不具備的：去噪均值的每個區塊都是該位置乾淨詞元的後驗邊際分佈。標準的 DDPM-style samplers 會將這些邊際分佈壓縮到一個單一的條件均值終點，並朝著這個 simplex-valued 點進行橋接，這通常是。

papers.summary: Structured LLM workflows, where specialized LLM sub-agents execute according to a predefined graph, have become a powerful abstraction for solving complex tasks. primary_link.title: GAGPO: Generalized Advantage Grouped Policy Optimization

papers.summary: Reinforcement learning has become a powerful paradigm for post-training large language model agents, yet credit assignment in multi-turn environments remains a challenge. papers.summary_zh: 強化學習已成為後訓練大型語言模型代理的強大範式，但在 multi-turn 環境中的 credit assignment 仍然是一個挑戰。代理通常僅在 episode 結束時收到稀疏的 trajectory-level 獎勵，這使得難以確定哪些中間動作促成了成功或失敗。因此，如何在不依賴昂貴的 auxiliary value models 的情況下，將延遲的結果傳播回單個決策步驟，仍然是一個懸而未決的問題。

papers.summary: As automated reasoning systems advance rapidly, there is a growing need for research-level formal mathematical problems to accurately evaluate their capabilities. We investigate single-victim communication perturbation attacks against Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning-trained systems and propose methods that use gradient information from the Jacobian to identify which messages, agent, and timesteps are most susceptible to attack and have the greatest impact on the system. We enhance these methods with two proposed adversari
papers.summary_zh: Multi-agent systems 依賴通訊來進行資訊共享和行動協調，這使其容易受到攻擊。我們研究了針對 Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning 訓練系統的 single-victim communication perturbation attacks，並提出了利用 Jacobian 的 gradient 資訊來識別哪些 messages、agent 和 timesteps 最容易受到攻擊並對系統產生最大影響的方法。我們透過兩種提出的 adversarial 方法增強了這些方法。
papers.title: Finding the Weakest Link: Adversarial Attack against Multi-Agent Communications
papers.title_zh: 找出最薄弱的環節：針對 Multi-Agent 通訊的對抗性攻擊

links.title: HCSG: Human-Centric Semantic-Geometric Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation

primary_link.title: HCSG: Human-Centric Semantic-Geometric Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation

papers.summary: VLN has achieved remarkable progress by scaling data and model capacity. However, the assumption of a static environment breaks down in real-world indoor scenarios, where robots inevitably encounter dynamic pedestrians. Existing human-aware approaches typically treat humans merely as moving obstacles based on implicit visual cues, lacking the explicit reasoning required to interpret human intentions or maintain social norms. To address this, we propose HCSG, the first human-centric framework for
papers.summary_zh: VLN 透過擴展資料和 model capacity 取得了顯著進展。然而，在真實世界的室內場景中，機器人不可避免地會遇到動態行人，靜態環境的假設便會失效。現有的 human-aware 方法通常僅基於 implicit visual cues 將人類視為移動障礙物，缺乏解釋人類意圖或維持 social norms 所需的 explicit reasoning。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 HCSG，這是第一個用於 Vision-Language Navigation 的 human-centric framework。
papers.title: HCSG: Human-Centric Semantic-Geometric Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation
papers.title_zh: HCSG：用於 Vision-Language Navigation 的以人為中心的語義-幾何推理

links.title: OxyEcomBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models across E-Commerce Ecosystems

primary_link.title: OxyEcomBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models across E-Commerce Ecosystems

papers.summary: LLMs and MLLMs have become indispensable tools across a wide range of applications. E-commerce, however, poses distinctive challenges -- including intricate domain knowledge, long-tail product evidence, heterogeneous visual data, and the interplay among multiple stakeholder roles -- that diverge substantially from the general world knowledge these models are primarily trained on, often causing a notable gap between their open-domain and e-commerce performance. To systematically quantify this gap
papers.summary_zh: LLMs 和 MLLMs 已成為廣泛應用中不可或缺的工具。然而，電子商務提出了獨特的挑戰——包括複雜的 domain knowledge、長尾產品證據、heterogeneous visual data，以及多個 stakeholder 角色之間的相互作用——這些挑戰與這些模型主要訓練的通用世界知識顯著不同，通常會導致它們在 open-domain 和電子商務性能之間存在顯著差距。為系統地量化這一差距，我們
papers.title: OxyEcomBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models across E-Commerce Ecosystems
papers.title_zh: OxyEcomBench：基準測試跨電子商務生態系統的 Multimodal Foundation Models

links.title: GRACE: Gradient-aligned Reasoning Data Curation for Efficient Post-training

primary_link.title: GRACE: Gradient-aligned Reasoning Data Curation for Efficient Post-training

papers.summary: Existing reasoning data curation pipelines score whole samples, treating every intermediate step as equally valuable. In reality, steps within a trace contribute very unevenly, and selecting reasoning data well requires assessing them individually. We present GRACE, a gradient-aligned curation method that views each reasoning trace as a sequence of optimization events and scores every step by two complementary signals: its alignment with the answer-oriented gradient direction, and its consistenc
papers.summary_zh: 現有的 reasoning data curation pipelines 對整個樣本進行評分，將每個 intermediate step 視為同等有價值。實際上，trace 中的步驟貢獻非常不均勻，而良好地選擇 reasoning data 需要單獨評估它們。我們提出了 GRACE，這是一種 gradient-aligned curation 方法，它將每個 reasoning trace 視為一系列 optimization events，並透過兩個互補的 signals 來評估每個步驟：它與 answer-oriented gradient direction 的對齊程度，以及它的 consistency。
papers.title: GRACE: Gradient-aligned Reasoning Data Curation for Efficient Post-training
papers.title_zh: GRACE：用於高效 Post-training 的梯度對齊推理資料策劃

links.title: PDCR: Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward for Vision-Language Reasoning

primary_link.title: PDCR: Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward for Vision-Language Reasoning

radar.summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) traditionally relies on a sparse, outcome-based signal. Recent work shows that providing a fine-grained, model-intrinsic signal (rewarding the confidence growth in the ground-truth answer) effectively improves language reasoning training by providing step-level guidance without costly external models. While effective for unimodal text, we find that naively applying this global reward to vision-language (V-L) reasoning is a suboptimal strategy
radar.summary_zh: 可驗證獎勵的 Reinforcement Learning (RLVR) 傳統上依賴於稀疏的、基於結果的訊號。最近的研究表明，提供細粒度的、模型內在的訊號（獎勵 ground-truth 答案的置信度增長）透過提供步驟級指導而無需昂貴的外部模型，有效地改進了語言推理訓練。雖然對於單模態文本有效，但我們發現將這種全局獎勵天真地應用於視覺-語言 (V-L) 推理是一種次優策略。
radar.title: PDCR: Perception-Decomposed Confidence Reward for Vision-Language Reasoning
radar.title_zh: PDCR: 用於視覺-語言推理的感知分解置信度獎勵

links.title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models

primary_link.title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models

radar.summary: Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese an
radar.summary_zh: 家紋 (Kamon, family crests) 是日本文化的重要組成部分，也是組合式視覺識別的自然測試案例：每個徽章結合了少量符號選擇，但可能描述的空間是稀疏的。我們引入 KamonBench，一個基於語法的圖像到結構基準測試，包含 20,000 個合成的複合徽章和輔助組件範例。每個複合徽章都配有一個正式的 kamon 描述語言——「kamon yōgo」——描述，一個分段的日文。
radar.title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models
radar.title_zh: KamonBench：一個用於評估視覺-語言模型中組合因子恢復的基於語法的資料集

links.title: Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study

primary_link.title: Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study

radar.summary: Automated detection of vulnerability-fixing commits (VFCs) is critical for timely security patch deployment, as advisory databases lag patch releases by a median of 25 days and many fixes never receive advisories. We present a comprehensive evaluation of code language model based VFC detection through a unified framework consolidating over 20 fragmented datasets spanning more than 180000 commits. Across over 180 experiments with fine-tuned models from 125 M to 14 B parameters, we find no evidenc
radar.summary_zh: 自動偵測漏洞修復提交 (VFCs) 對於及時部署安全修補程式至關重要，因為諮詢資料庫比修補程式發布平均延遲 25 天，並且許多修復從未收到諮詢。我們透過一個統一框架，整合了 20 多個碎片化資料集，涵蓋超過 180000 個 commits，對基於 code language model 的 VFC 偵測進行了全面評估。在 180 多個實驗中，使用從 125 M 到 14 B 參數的 fine-tuned models，我們沒有發現任何證據。
radar.title: Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study
radar.title_zh: 以程式碼為中心的漏洞修復提交偵測：統一基準和實證研究

links.title: Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation

primary_link.title: Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation

radar.summary: Contrastive reinforcement learning (CRL) learns goal-conditioned Q-values through a contrastive objective over state-action and goal representations, removing the need for hand-crafted reward functions. Despite impressive success in achieving viable self-supervised learning in RL, all existing CRL algorithms rely on off-policy optimisation and are mostly constrained to continuous action spaces, with little research invested in discrete environments. This leaves CRL disconnected from widely used
radar.summary_zh: 對比式 Reinforcement Learning (CRL) 透過對 state-action 和目標表示的對比目標來學習目標條件的 Q-values，從而無需手動設計的 reward functions。儘管在 RL 中實現可行的 self-supervised learning 取得了令人印象深刻的成功，但所有現有的 CRL 算法都依賴於 off-policy optimisation，並且主要受限於連續的 action spaces，很少有研究投入到離散環境中。這使得 CRL 與廣泛使用的。
radar.title: Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation
radar.title_zh: 透過對比式近端策略優化進行自監督 On-Policy Reinforcement Learning

links.title: Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive

primary_link.title: Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive

radar.summary: Watermarking is widely proposed for provenance, attribution, and safety monitoring in generative models, yet is typically evaluated only under adversaries who attempt to evade detection or induce false positives at the level of individual samples. We argue that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, and that internal monitoring is unavoidable given per-entity attribution keys and messages, as well as detector access. We introduce an observer-based threat model in which observe
radar.summary_zh: 浮水印被廣泛提議用於 generative models 中的 provenance、attribution 和 safety monitoring，然而，通常僅在試圖逃避偵測或在個別樣本層面引起 false positives 的對手情況下進行評估。我們認為浮水印應被視為一種 monitoring primitive，並且考慮到每個實體的 attribution keys 和 messages，以及 detector access，內部監控是不可避免的。我們引入了一種基於觀察者的威脅模型，其中觀察。
radar.title: Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive
radar.title_zh: 浮水印應被視為一種監控原語

links.title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents

primary_link.title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents

radar.summary: Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring quality across the full scope of voice-specific failure modes. We present EVA-Bench, an end-to-end evaluation framework that addresses both. On the simulation side, EVA-Bench orchestrates bot-to-bot aud
radar.summary_zh: Voice agents 是一種執行語音對話以完成任務的 artificial intelligence systems，正日益廣泛地部署於 enterprise applications 中。然而，現有 benchmark 都未能同時解決兩項核心評估挑戰：生成逼真的模擬對話，以及衡量所有 voice-specific failure modes 的品質。我們提出了 EVA-Bench，這是一個端到端評估框架，能夠同時解決這兩項挑戰。在模擬方面，EVA-Bench 協調 bot-to-bot aud
radar.title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents
radar.title_zh: EVA-Bench：評估 Voice Agents 的新型端到端框架

links.title: Provable Quantization with Randomized Hadamard Transform

primary_link.title: Provable Quantization with Randomized Hadamard Transform

radar.summary: Vector quantization via random projection followed by scalar quantization is a fundamental primitive in machine learning, with applications ranging from similarity search to federated learning and KV cache compression. While dense random rotations yield clean theoretical guarantees, they require $Θ(d^2)$ time. The randomized Hadamard transform $HD$ reduces this cost to $O(d \log d)$, but its discrete structure complicates analysis and leads to weaker or purely empirical compression guarantees.
radar.summary_zh: 透過 random projection 接著 scalar quantization 進行的 vector quantization 是 machine learning 中的一個基本原語 (primitive)，應用範圍涵蓋 similarity search、federated learning 和 KV cache compression。雖然 dense random rotations 能提供清晰的 theoretical guarantees，但它們需要 $Θ(d^2)$ 的時間。randomized Hadamard transform $HD$ 將此成本降低至 $O(d \log d)$，但其離散結構使分析複雜化，並導致較弱或純粹經驗性的 compression guarantees。
radar.title: Provable Quantization with Randomized Hadamard Transform
radar.title_zh: 具備 Randomized Hadamard Transform 的可證明量化

primary_link.title: EvoGround: Self-Evolving Video Agents for Video Temporal Grounding

Existing methods rely on large, task-specific datasets requiring costly manual annotation. The proposer generates query--moment pairs from raw videos, while the solver
radar.summary_zh: Video temporal grounding (VTG) 以未經修剪的視訊和 natural-language query 作為輸入，並定位最符合該 query 的時間點。現有方法依賴大型、task-specific 的資料集，需要昂貴的 manual annotation。我們引入了 EvoGround，這是一個由兩個耦合的 self-evolving agents（一個 proposer 和一個 solver）組成的框架，它們無需任何 human-labeled data 即可從原始視訊中學習 temporal grounding。proposer 從原始視訊生成 query–moment pairs，而 solver
radar.title: EvoGround: Self-Evolving Video Agents for Video Temporal Grounding
radar.title_zh: EvoGround：用於 Video Temporal Grounding 的自演化視訊代理

links.title: Realtime-VLA FLASH: Speculative Inference Framework for Diffusion-based VLAs

primary_link.title: Realtime-VLA FLASH: Speculative Inference Framework for Diffusion-based VLAs

radar.summary: Diffusion-based vision-language-action models (dVLAs) are promising for embodied intelligence but are fundamentally limited in real-time deployment by the high latency of full inference. We propose Realtime-VLA FLASH, a speculative inference framework that eliminates most full inference calls during replanning by introducing a lightweight draft model with parallel verification via the main model's Action Expert and a phase-aware fallback mechanism that reverts to the full inference pipeline when
radar.summary_zh: Diffusion-based vision-language-action models (dVLAs) 在 embodied intelligence 方面具有前景，但由於 full inference 的高延遲，其 real-time 部署受到根本限制。我們提出了 Realtime-VLA FLASH，這是一個 speculative inference 框架，透過引入一個輕量級的 draft model，並利用 main model 的 Action Expert 進行 parallel verification，以及一個 phase-aware fallback mechanism，在 replanning 期間消除了大多數 full inference 呼叫，該機制在特定情況下會恢復到完整的 inference pipeline。

radar.title_zh: Realtime-VLA FLASH：用於 Diffusion-based VLAs 的推測性推理框架

primary_link.title: FrameSkip: Learning from Fewer but More Informative Frames in VLA Training

We argue that this convention creates a temporal supervision imbalance: long low-change segments dominate the training stream, while manipulation-critical transitions such as alignment, contact, grasping, and release appear only sparsely. radar.summary_zh: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies 通常是從密集的 robot demonstration trajectories 進行訓練的，這些 trajectory 通常透過 teleoperation 收集，並對每個錄製的幀進行採樣，就好像它提供了同等有用的 supervision 一樣。我們認為這種慣例造成了時間上的 supervision imbalance：長時間的 low-change segments 在訓練流中佔主導地位，而 manipulation-critical transitions，例如 alignment、contact、grasping 和 release，則僅稀疏地出現。我們引入了 FrameSkip，這是一個 data-layer fr
radar.title: FrameSkip: Learning from Fewer but More Informative Frames in VLA Training

primary_link.title: Learning POMDP World Models from Observations with Language-Model Priors

radar.summary_zh: 無論是導航建築物、操作機器人還是玩遊戲，一個能在環境中有效行動的 agent，都必須先學習該環境如何運作的內部模型。Partially-observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) 為此類內部世界模型提供了一個靈活的建模類別，但僅從觀察-行動軌跡中學習它們是具有挑戰性的，並且通常需要大量的環境互動。我們探討 language-model priors 是否能減少昂貴的互動...

radar.title_zh: 從觀察中學習帶有 Language-Model Priors 的 POMDP 世界模型

primary_link.title: Multi-Objective and Mixed-Reward Reinforcement Learning via Reward-Decorrelated Policy Optimization

In these settings, heterogeneous reward distributions and correlated reward dimensions often destabilize the construction of scalar advantages. To address these challenges, we propose Reward-Decorrelated Policy Optimization (RDPO), a reward-processing method designed to explicitly target both failure modes. radar.summary_zh: 複雜的 reinforcement learning 環境經常採用 multi-task 和 mixed-reward 的 форму。在這些設定中，異構的 reward 分布和相關的 reward 維度經常會使 scalar advantages 的構建不穩定。為了應對這些挑戰，我們提出了 Reward-Decorrelated Policy Optimization (RDPO)，這是一種 reward 處理方法，旨在明確地解決這兩種失效模式。RDPO 首先利用 Magnitude-Aware Quantile normalization 來穩定 prompt-level 的 [優勢值]...

links.title: Guide, Think, Act: Interactive Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models

primary_link.title: Guide, Think, Act: Interactive Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models

radar.summary: In this paper, we propose GTA-VLA(Guide, Think, Act), an interactive Vision-Language-Action (VLA) framework that enables spatially steerable embodied reasoning by allowing users to guide robot policies with explicit visual cues. radar.summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了 GTA-VLA (Guide, Think, Act)，這是一個互動式的 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 框架，它允許使用者透過明確的視覺線索引導機器人策略，從而實現空間可導向的具身推理。現有的 VLA 模型學習將 multi-modal 觀察直接「感知-行動」(Sense-to-Act) 的映射到機器人動作。雖然在訓練分佈內有效，但此類緊密耦合的策略在 out-of-domain (OOD) 偏移下會變得脆弱，並且在發生故障時難以糾正...

radar.title_zh: Guide, Think, Act：Vision-Language-Action 模型中的互動式具身推理

radar.title_zh: 用於高效 3D Language Gaussian Splatting 的稀疏碼提升

links.title: Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation with an Open Property-Equivalence Verifier for NL-to-SVA Generation

primary_link.title: Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation with an Open Property-Equivalence Verifier for NL-to-SVA Generation

radar.summary: LLM-based generation of SystemVerilog Assertions (SVA) is often reported as nearing saturation, with the strongest specialized model reaching ${\sim}76\%$ accuracy on NL2SVA-Human. We show that this aggregate hides a temporal gap: models that appear strong overall still collapse to a few implication templates on bounded-delay and liveness specifications. The core issue is that the dominant recipe, supervised fine-tuning on NL/SVA pairs, optimizes token-level mimicry rather than the \emph{propert
radar.summary_zh: 基於 LLM 的 SystemVerilog Assertions (SVA) 生成常被報導接近飽和，最強的專門模型在 NL2SVA-Human 上達到約 76% 的準確度。我們發現這個總體結果隱藏了一個時間上的差距：表面上整體表現強勁的模型，在 bounded-delay 和 liveness specifications 上仍然會崩潰到只剩下少數幾個 implication templates。核心問題在於主流方法，即對 NL/SVA 對進行 supervised fine-tuning，優化的是 token 級別的模仿，而非屬性（propert）。
radar.title: Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation with an Open Property-Equivalence Verifier for NL-to-SVA Generation

links.title: OSDN: Improving Delta Rule with Provable Online Preconditioning in Linear Attention

primary_link.title: OSDN: Improving Delta Rule with Provable Online Preconditioning in Linear Attention

radar.summary: Linear attention and state-space models offer constant-memory alternatives to softmax attention, but often struggle with in-context associative recall. The Delta Rule mitigates this by writing each token via one step of online gradient descent. However, its step size relies on a single scalar gate that ignores the feature-wise curvature of the inner objective. We propose Online Scaled DeltaNet (OSDN), which augments the scalar gate with a diagonal preconditioner updated online via hypergradient
radar.summary_zh: Linear attention 和 state-space models 為 softmax attention 提供了恆定記憶體 (constant-memory) 的替代方案，但通常在 in-context 聯想回憶方面表現不佳。Delta Rule 透過一次 online gradient descent 的步驟寫入每個 token 來緩解此問題。然而，其步長依賴於一個單一的 scalar gate，該 gate 忽略了內部目標的 feature-wise 彎曲度。我們提出了 Online Scaled DeltaNet (OSDN)，它透過 hypergradient 在線更新一個 diagonal preconditioner 來增強 scalar gate。
radar.title: OSDN: Improving Delta Rule with Provable Online Preconditioning in Linear Attention
radar.title_zh: OSDN：透過 Linear Attention 中可證明的在線預條件改進 Delta Rule

radar.summary_zh: 諸如 BPE dropout 等 Subword regularization 方法通常只在 fine-tuning 期間應用，而 pretraining 通常使用確定性 tokenization 完成。這在 pretraining 和 fine-tuning 之間造成了潛在的 segmentation mismatch。我們研究在 pretraining 期間應用 BPE dropout 是否能提高低資源 NLP 中的 downstream 性能。我們在英語、德語、法語、西班牙語、斯瓦希里語和科薩語的下採樣子集上訓練了單語和雙語 BERT 模型，並且...
radar.title: Pretraining Language Models with Subword Regularization: An Empirical Study of BPE Dropout in Low-Resource NLP

links.title: TurboGR: An Accelerated Training System for Large-Scale Generative Recommendation

primary_link.title: TurboGR: An Accelerated Training System for Large-Scale Generative Recommendation

radar.summary: Generative recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm that replaces fragmented, scenario-specific architectures with unified Transformer-based models, exhibiting scaling-law behavior where recommendation quality improves systematically with increased model capacity and training data. However, deploying GR at scale on Ascend NPUs faces fundamental system-level challenges. These challenges are further exacerbated on Ascend NPUs due to the absence of high-performance implementations fo
radar.summary_zh: 生成式推薦 (Generative recommendation, GR) 已成為一種有前景的範式，它用統一的 Transformer-based 模型取代了碎片化、特定場景的架構，展現出 scaling-law 行為，即推薦品質隨著模型容量和訓練數據的增加而系統性地提高。然而，在 Ascend NPUs 上大規模部署 GR 面臨著根本性的系統級挑戰。由於缺乏高性能的實現，這些挑戰在 Ascend NPUs 上變得更加嚴峻。

links.title: Securing AI agents: How AWS and Cisco AI Defense scale MCP and A2A deployments

primary_link.title: Securing AI agents: How AWS and Cisco AI Defense scale MCP and A2A deployments

radar.summary: The Cisco and AWS partnership addresses three challenges enterprises face when scaling AI agents: visibility gaps, security bottlenecks, and compliance risks. In this post, we explore how you can overcome AI security challenges through automated scanning and unified governance.
radar.title: Securing AI agents: How AWS and Cisco AI Defense scale MCP and A2A deployments

links.title: Fine-tune LLM with Databricks Unity Catalog and Amazon SageMaker AI

primary_link.title: Fine-tune LLM with Databricks Unity Catalog and Amazon SageMaker AI

radar.summary: In this post, we demonstrate how to build a secure, complete LLM fine-tuning workflow that integrates Unity Catalog with Amazon SageMaker AI using Amazon EMR Serverless for preprocessing. The solution shows how to securely access governed data, maintain lineage across services, fine-tune the Ministral-3-3B-Instruct model, and register trained artifacts back into Unity Catalog. With this approach, you can continue using your existing services while preserving central governance, tracking data lineage without compromising security or compliance requirements.
radar.title: Fine-tune LLM with Databricks Unity Catalog and Amazon SageMaker AI

links.title: Build financial document processing with Pulse AI and Amazon Bedrock

primary_link.title: Build financial document processing with Pulse AI and Amazon Bedrock

radar.summary: This post demonstrates how to build a documentation extraction and model fine-tuning pipeline that addresses challenges when processing the complex financial documents. By combining Pulse AI's advanced document understanding capabilities with the powerful AI services of Amazon Bedrock, organizations can achieve enterprise-grade accuracy and extract contextually relevant financial insights at scale.
radar.title: Build financial document processing with Pulse AI and Amazon Bedrock

Introducing GridSFM, a small foundation model that can predict AC optimal power flow in milliseconds, boosting efficiency and unlocking cost savings. Learn how GridSFM gives grid operators direct visibility into congestion, stability, and system health.

radar.summary: Building end-to-end live streaming applications with real-time voice interaction presents several challenges. This post introduces a solution based on Amazon Nova 2 Sonic (Nova Sonic) and Amazon Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC (WebRTC) that addresses these challenges. In this post, we’ll walk through the solution architecture, implementation patterns, and two real-world scenario examples.
radar.title: Build real-time voice streaming applications with Amazon Nova Sonic and WebRTC

links.title: mimalloc: A new, high-performance, scalable memory allocator for the modern era

primary_link.title: mimalloc: A new, high-performance, scalable memory allocator for the modern era

radar.summary:
mimalloc is an open-source, modern, scalable memory allocator that is a drop-in replacement for malloc and free. It is relatively small (~12K lines), with clear internal data structures, and is easy to build and integrate into other projects. It provides bounded worst-case allocation times (up to OS primitives), bounded space overhead, low internal fragmentation, and minimal contention by relying almost exclusively on atomic operations.

The post mimalloc: A new, high-performance, scalable memory allocator for the modern era appeared first on Microsoft Research.
radar.title: mimalloc: A new, high-performance, scalable memory allocator for the modern era

primary_link.title: Training Long-Context Vision-Language Models Effectively with Generalization Beyond 128K Context

top5.summary: Long-context modeling is becoming a core capability of modern large vision-language models (LVLMs), enabling sustained context management across long-document understanding, video analysis, and multi-turn tool use in agentic workflows. Yet practical training recipes remain insufficiently explored, particularly for designing and balancing long-context data mixtures. In this work, we present a systematic study of long-context continued pre-training for LVLMs, extending a 7B model from 32K to 128K
